name: Meltdown of Mind
description:
After successfully eliminating The Mind Flayer with Zennik and Vincent you all take your leave from the moon. Zennik makes one last video before leaving Shroud-427.

...At least that is what was supposed to happen. The ashes of the Illithid light the whole moon on fire, the fear that Zennik has. Escort a traumatized lizard out of the flaming moon!

Has two intros, one for if Vincent lived from your experience with the last bot and one if he died in your experience! Course choose whichever one you like.
creator: HunterKillerDrone25
